_note: Metadata only. Real op functions are inlined in ~/.claude/workflows/qa-orchestrator.js because workflow body cannot import. Deterministic ops are PURE-CODE ONLY per ORCHESTRATION-MIGRATION-PLAN.md §F.13 #1 lesson — no external commands, no FS, no network. Any QA layer that runs tsc/eslint/playwright/lighthouse/axe/etc. is an AGENT node, NOT a deterministic op.

run_static_baseline_policy.description: Classify pre-collected static baseline stdout (tsc + eslint + prettier + npm audit + git-secrets — already run by upstream StaticBaseline AGENT node) against floor policy. Pure-code threshold check on parsed counts.

qa_gate_policy.description: Compute PASS/WARN/BLOCK release decision. BLOCK if: critical_release_path has 0 evidence OR any layer marked FAIL OR Hard Rule §2 violated OR dispatch_failures non-empty OR floor_rule_status.triggered==true AND mandated layers absent OR null_outputs mapped to MISSING are present. WARN if any CONDITIONAL_PASS. PASS otherwise.

compute_critical_path_coverage.description: For each path in ctx.critical_release_paths (auth / payment / checkout / signup / data-export / admin / billing), check whether at least 1 layer's evidence references the path. Returns uncovered_paths list.

flaky_quarantine_decision.description: Apply Floor Rule §3.6: refuse quarantine for any test in critical_release_paths set even if 8 required fields are supplied. Returns admissible_quarantines vs rejected_critical_path list.

visual_gate_policy._r9_note: Upstream VisualAudit AGENT node runs Playwright/Storybook snapshot diff. This deterministic op classifies parsed diff counts against threshold policy.
visual_gate_policy.description: Threshold classification over VisualAudit parsed diff evidence (per-surface pixel-diff counts vs threshold). Pure-code.

a11y_gate_policy._r9_note: Upstream A11yAudit AGENT node runs axe-core / Lighthouse a11y / pa11y. This deterministic op classifies parsed violation counts against WCAG threshold.
a11y_gate_policy.description: Threshold classification over A11yAudit parsed evidence (critical/serious/moderate/minor counts vs threshold). Pure-code.

perf_gate_policy._r9_note: Upstream PerfAudit AGENT node runs Lighthouse CI / bundle analyzer / k6-light. This deterministic op classifies parsed metrics against threshold policy.
perf_gate_policy.description: Threshold classification over PerfAudit parsed metrics (LCP / INP / CLS / TBT / bundle size vs threshold). Pure-code.

no_layers_active.description: Returns true if state.LayerSelect.selected_layers is empty (Skill should not have launched). Used as skip_if to short-circuit downstream nodes.
no_layers_active.called_as: precondition guard via skip_if on UnitOrComponent / E2E

critical_path_not_covered.description: Returns true if compute_critical_path_coverage outputs uncovered_paths non-empty AND ctx.policy.require_full_coverage == true.

evidence_bundle_incomplete.description: Returns true if any required evidence layer is missing from .qa/evidence/<tag>/ (per qa-sdk evidence.validate-presence expected list).
evidence_bundle_incomplete.called_as: precondition guard inside EvidenceBundle (forces structured error instead of PASS)

no_flaky_signal.description: Returns true if no E2E or Component test produced retry-pass / CI-only-fail signal. Used as skip_if on FlakyTriage to skip cleanly when there is nothing to triage.

fanout_item_dropped._r7_note: Reviewer R7 — null/skipped/dropped agent output in parallel/pipeline must NOT be silently filtered.
fanout_item_dropped.description: Returns true if any fanout/pipeline item in state.<NodeName>.results[] is null OR has status 'STALL_EXCEEDED' OR 'BUDGET_DROPPED'.
fanout_item_dropped.called_as: precondition guard inside Gate / EvidenceBundle — triggers map_null_outputs_to_missing invariant

critical_release_paths_have_owner._doc_ref: enterprise-qa-testing SKILL.md §3.6 Floor Rules + §9 Flaky Governance accountability requirement
critical_release_paths_have_owner.description: Post-invariant on FlakyTriage output. For every test in critical_release_paths quarantined, force admissible=false (Floor Rule §3.6 — critical paths cannot be quarantined). Mutates output, NEVER silently drops.
critical_release_paths_have_owner.outputs: mutated FlakyTriage output with rejected_critical_path filled

ensure_evidence_bundle_layers.description: Post-invariant on EvidenceBundle output. Force per_layer_decisions to include every layer in state.LayerSelect.selected_layers; auto-mark missing layers as decision=MISSING for downstream Gate visibility.

map_null_outputs_to_missing._r7_note: Reviewer R7 NEW — converts null/dropped/timed-out fanout or pipeline items to structured MISSING records before Gate consumes. Prevents .filter(Boolean) silent fanout shrink.
map_null_outputs_to_missing.description: For every phase in {UnitOrComponent, ComponentOrContract, E2E, VisualAudit, A11yAudit, PerfAudit}: scan state.<phase>.results[]; for each null/undefined or item with status in {STALL_EXCEEDED, BUDGET_DROPPED, AGENT_ERROR}, emit {phase, item_id_or_index, status: 'DISPATCH_FAILED_OR_SKIPPED', decision: 'MISSING', blocks_release: true} into state.dispatch_failures[]. EvidenceBundle MUST write dispatch_failures.yaml as separate evidence layer. Gate MUST count MISSING toward BLOCK.
map_null_outputs_to_missing.outputs: state.dispatch_failures[] populated; per-item MISSING decisions made visible to Gate
